creator: andleb231175@gmail.com
text:
Hi all

Recently I upgraded my FreeBSD 11.4 with VirtualBox 5.2.44 (legacy port) to FreeBSD 12.4 with Virtual 6.1.36. For many years Freebsd 11.4 + VirtualBox 5.2.44 (Host OS - FreeBSD, Guest OS - Windows 7/10 with bridged networking) worked perfect.
Now I faced with following thing. Sometimes Guest OS Windows become unavailable due to error "the default gateway is not available" in bridged networking. I can fix it by Windows troubleshooter, resetting adapter or just switch on/off network adapter, but after a while I get the same result "the default gateway is not available". 
I tried to use "clean" Windows 7/10 installation and also got "the default gateway is not available". Sure I tried all the fixing methods (reset networking settings, turn off power management for adapter and etc).
I tried to use NAT adapter and it works perfectly, but I need Guest OS to be in same localnet as Host OS.
Any idea?
